signals.headline: Cooper Flagg Surges to NBA Rookie of the Year Favorite After 96-Point Outburst Over Two Games** | YES | HIGH[1][2][4]
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg Surges to NBA Rookie of the Year Favorite After 96-Point Outburst Over Two Games** | YES | HIGH[1][2][4]

Cooper Flagg, Dallas Mavericks rookie, scored 51 points vs. Orlando and 45 points vs. the Lakers, totaling 96 points, marking the first time a rookie achieved 45+ points in consecutive games since Walt Bellamy in 1962; he followed with a 25/9 game and his first triple-double[1][2]
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?
